message:
feat(config): WASM config evaluator with callback pattern (wa-2t4oa)

Adds wasm_config.rs implementing WASM config evaluation via a caller-
provided evaluator function (typically WasmEngine::eval_config). Searches
$FRANKENTERM_CONFIG_FILE and XDG paths for frankenterm.wasm files.
Supports config overrides. 6 tests with mock evaluators.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -9,6 +9,7 @@ publish = false
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 env_logger.workspace = true
+tempfile.workspace = true
 
 [features]
 default = ["lua"]
